heroHeadline:
UAP Disclosure:
80 Years of Secrecy Unraveling
heroSubtitle: Tracking official government actions, congressional hearings, declassified documents, and institutional statements on Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena. This tracker documents the disclosure process — what officials have said, what has been declassified, and what remains contested.
footerNote: This tracker documents official statements, legislative actions, and institutional processes related to UAP disclosure. It does not validate or endorse the claims contained within official testimonies. EDITORIAL NOTE: Events record that officials made specific claims — not that those claims are verified as factually true. All contested claims include opposing positions.
